name: Vespia
description: AI-powered business verification and AML compliance API for fintechs and crypto platforms.

seo.title: Vespia — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Vespia: AI-powered business verification and AML compliance API for fintechs and crypto platforms.

when_to_use: AI-powered KYB verification for crypto platform onboarding
AML compliance API for fintech business customer screening
UBO discovery and ownership chain analysis for due diligence
Sanctions and PEP check integrated into KYB workflow
Ongoing business monitoring for regulatory change events

pros: AI-driven business verification for fintech and crypto
KYB plus AML screening in one API
Lightweight alternative to Moody's or D&B KYB
cons: Younger vendor with limited track record
Registry coverage depth below Kyckr or Moody's
Enterprise buyers may demand more references
Pricing not fully transparent on the site
review.verdict: Promising AI-driven KYB for EU fintech and crypto; verify registry depth before depending on it.
review.best_for: EU fintechs and crypto platforms wanting modern AI-driven KYB and AML with GDPR-aligned hosting
review.not_for: Large banks needing long vendor track records and named tier-1 registry and screening sources
